entity.label: Pethuel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Vision of God, the father of Joel the prophet (Joel 1:1).

nodes.label: Pethuel
nodes.description: Vision of God, the father of Joel the prophet (Joel 1:1).

nodes.label: Joel
nodes.description: Jehovah is his God. The second of the twelve minor prophets. He was the son of Pethuel. His personal history is only known from his book.

verses.text: The word of the LORD that came to Joel the son of Pethuel.
